nasb.text: For Pharaoh will say of the sons of Israel, ‘They are wandering aimlessly in the land; the wilderness has shut them in.’

esv.text: For Pharaoh will say of the people of Israel, ‘They are wandering in the land; the wilderness has shut them in.’

cnv.text: 法老必論到以色列人的事，說：‘他們在這地走迷了路，曠野把他們困住了。’

ccb.text: 法老必定以为你们走迷了路，被困在旷野。
